---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)

source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "1_Headrick_equations.R"))
source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "2_Headrick_find_coefficients.R"))
source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "3_Headrick_poly_coefficients.R"))
source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "4_Headrick_intermediate_correlation.R"))
source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "5_Headrick_data_generation.R"))
source(here("Functions", "Helper Functions", "6_Headrick_method.R"))
```

```{r}
k <- 1
n <- 1000
mean <- 0
var <- 1
skew <- 0
kurt <- 0
corr <- diag(nrow = k)

headrick_method(k = k, n = n, mean = mean, var = var, skew = skew, kurt = kurt, corr = corr)
```
